---
title: "Research & Publications"
---

## Research focus

My research centres on school attendance problems and emotionally based school avoidance (EBSA) --- the subset of school non-attendance driven by emotional distress rather than truancy or parent-condoned absence. I am interested in how EBSA is defined and measured, how it develops across childhood and adolescence, and what interventions are supported by the evidence.

A parallel strand of my work engages with digital mental health: how individuals cope with stress through social media use and online behaviour, examined through network analytic approaches.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## PhD Research

My PhD by publication comprises three interlinked empirical papers on EBSA.

::: paper-grid
::: {.paper-card style="color:green"}
#### [**Paper 1**]{.paper-label}**:** Systematic review

A [PROSPERO-registered](https://www.crd.york.ac.uk/PROSPERO/view/CRD420251089918) systematic review and narrative synthesis of interventions for emotionally based school avoidance, examining construct definitions, outcome operationalisation, and intervention targets.
:::

::: {.paper-card style="color:brown"}
**Paper 2:** Longitudinal modelling

Examining how patterns of school attendance develop across childhood and early adolescence using large-scale Australian longitudinal cohort data (LSAC).
:::

::: {.paper-card style="color:crimson"}
[**Paper 3**]{.paper-label}**:** Population-level attendance

Exploring system-level patterns in school attendance and non-attendance using national education data, with attention to how administrative reporting shapes the visibility of EBSA.
:::
:::

::: paper-grid
::: paper-card
**Supervisory team**

-   [Dr Daniel Zarate](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-1508-8637)
-   [A/Prof Vasileios Stavropoulos](https://orcid.org/0000-0001-6964-4662)
-   [Dr Taylor Brown](https://orcid.org/0000-0001-9814-3832)
:::
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Publications

[2025]{.pub-year}

[Incremental Validity of Cognitive Impulsivity, Emotional Impulsivity, and Sensation Seeking in the Predictions of ADHD Inattention and Hyperactivity/Impulsivity Symptoms in Adults](https://doi.org/10.1007/s10862-025-10252-6)\
*Journal of Psychopathology and Behavioral Assessment*

[Stress-coping mechanisms and problematic social media use: A network analysis and differences across men and women](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.chbr.2025.100848)\
*Computers in Human Behavior Reports*

[Flowing in the net of disordered gaming: A network analysis approach](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.abrep.2025.100606)\
*Addictive Behaviors Reports*

[2024]{.pub-year}

[Examining how gamers connect with their avatars to assess their anxiety: A novel artificial intelligence approach](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.actpsy.2024.104298)\
*Acta Psychologica*

## Peer review

I contribute to peer review for journals in psychology, behavioural science, and digital health. Recent reviews include work for *Behaviour & Information Technology* and *Scientific Reports*.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

#### [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0009-0000-1020-2333) \| [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=ZEvUL_kAAAAJ&hl=en) \| [ResearchGate](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Connor-Conkey-Morrison)
